prompt: Create a wide horizontal multi-angle character setting profile. The character is a Chinese supermodel with nine-head proportions, realistic photography, wearing a swimsuit set (no water droplets on the body), barefoot. The page should include multiple angles of the same character: a front close-up, a confident standing front pose (one hand on hip), a back standing pose, a squatting pose with hands behind the head (low-angle rear view), and a pose on hands and knees looking back (low-angle rear view). Each image should be fully displayed. The layout should be customized according to the character's personality—visually rich but clear and easy to read. It can include handwritten-style notes, small arrows, and a prominent title area designed in a character name title style. All text on the page should be in Chinese.
